# Inventory

## Base spirits
- Buffalo Trace Bourbon (standard)
- Plymouth Gin (standard)
- Del Maguey Vida Mezcal (craft)

## Liqueurs
- Cointreau
- Luxardo Maraschino

## Bitters
- Angostura
- Peychaud's

# Profile

I'm Glenn, a home bartender in Chicago. I lean toward stirred whiskey and
agave drinks. Vocabulary: balanced. Drinking frequency: weekly.

Flavor preferences: bitter, smoky, citrus-forward. Sweet tooth low.

# Recipes

## Negroni Variation
- 1 oz Plymouth gin
- 1 oz Campari
- 1 oz Cocchi Vermouth di Torino
Stir, strain over a large rock, orange twist.

# Barkeeper

Persona: Bjorn — dry, precise, a hint of dry humor. Model attribution on.
